office_address.new: Ben's Electric Solutions, 123 Main St, Anytown, USA

after_hours_flow_summary.old: Calls are answered by property manager X or general contractor on call. If unable to reach, message is left and callback is scheduled.
after_hours_flow_summary.new: Ben will receive notifications and respond to emergencies during after-hours

office_hours_flow_summary.old: Calls are answered by Ben during business hours. If after hours, message is left and callback is scheduled.
office_hours_flow_summary.new: Agents will respond to calls during business hours, and Ben will be notified

notes.old: The client is a small electrician business with 30 years of experience. They have 3 company vans and 2 subcontractors. They do a variety of services, including service calls, renovations, and troubleshooting. They also do EV chargers and hot tub hookups. The client is looking for a phone system to manage their calls and is interested in the Clara AI phone answering service. Ben's Electrical Works is a 30-year-old company with a focus on electrical services.
notes.new: Client has one personal phone number and another for business, will be used for call forwarding. Service call fee is $115 and hourly charges are $90 for half hour increments. Ben's Electric Solutions is a 24/7 emergency service for gas stations and properties managed by GNM, with regular business hours from Monday to Friday.
